title: Run shared root features/ without symlinks
description: Use a single root features/ directory for Gherkin specs for both Python and Rust. Remove per-language feature copies and ensure Behave and Rust cucumber runners resolve the same files.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Validated shared root features/ setup without symlinks. Behave uses ../features with loader; Rust cucumber uses root features. Tests run: (1) cd python && python -m behave (28 features, 207 scenarios, all passed; wip skipped). (2) cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber (pass).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Spec parity check: python tools/check_spec_parity.py (Feature steps: 454; Python steps: 296; Rust steps: 296).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Both Python and Rust test runners execute the same root features/ files without symlinks; spec parity tooling passes.
